metadata.description: Public, general-purpose skills and plugins for Claude Code and Codex

plugins.name: kb-to-spec
plugins.description: Promote a private Markdown note into a shareable spec committed to a GitHub repo. Works with Claude Code and Codex. De-privatizes content, writes a standalone spec with an Authors header, links back from the private note, and keeps the two files independent.

plugins.name: js-perf-audit
plugins.description: Audit any JS-heavy codebase for performance issues. Checks bundle weight, code splitting, selector memoization, rendering architecture, and performance infrastructure. Produces a findings report with severity ratings and recommendations.

plugins.name: visual-screenshots
plugins.description: Capture before/after screenshots for PRs with visual UI changes using Playwright. Reads the repo's dev-server setup, captures matched before/after shots at multiple viewports, and can upload them straight into the PR comment as inline images. Works on github.com and GitHub Enterprise.
